div1.entryFree:
Gamester, 1) one addicted to play, or one engaged at play: Wiv. III, 1, 37. LLL I, 2, 44. H5 III, 6, 119.
2) a frolicksome fellow, a merry rogue: now will I stir this g. As I, 1, 170. sirrah young g. Shr. II, 402. you are a merry g. H8 I, 4, 45.
3) a prostitute: was a common g. to the camp, All's V, 3, 188. were you a g. at five? Per. IV, 6, 81.
